channel.title: Craft Beetle - Change Log Feed
channel.description: Latest updates from the change log

item.description: Games: Added - Darkest Dungeon, Reviewed - Enter The Gungeon, Reviewed - Warframe, Reviewed - Insurgency, Reviewed - Guns of Icarus Online, Reviewed - Goat Simulator, Reviewed - Kingdom Rush, Reviewed - Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2, Reviewed - What Remains of Edith Finch Books: Added - Blackshirts and Reds, Reviewed - L'Hégémonie Culturelle Films: Reviewed - Judas and the Black Messiah, Reviewed - Mystery Men Website: Added image compression to Films, Games, Shows, and Books, which has drastically increased loading speed and with a fraction of the space and literally no visual difference because the images were scaled down anyway.

item.title: Update on 2025.02.16
item.description: Garden: Added - 2025.02.15, Added - 2025.02.14, Added - 2025.02.11, Starting to identify the genus and species of the plants and fungi I have photographed as requested by a good friend. Updated the page description to match. I encourage you to reach out if you have identified anything I am missing or got wrong. Critters: Added - 2025.02.14, Added - 2025.02.13, Added - 2025.02.12 Films: Reviewed - Once Upon A Time In Hollywood Games: Reviewed - Bad North Blog: Added "Reading Time" to blogs. item.title: Update on 2024.12.08
item.description: Shows: New show review. Critters: Added critter pictures. Garden: Added plant pictures.

item.title: Update on 2024.12.01
item.description: Blog: New blog post!, Added picture to the first blog post. Films: Added film reviews. Games: Added game reviews. Books: Added book reviews. Links: Added some more links. Website: Rounded image corner., Updated footer., Added spoiler section to reviews so I can write my full thoughts and not spoil anything for anyone who doesn't want spoilers.

item.title: Update on 2024.11.24
item.description: Games: Added game reviews. Films: Added film reviews. Critters: Added critter pictures. Garden: Added garden pictures. Website: Overhauled the crafts page to add image gallery buttons instead of a sliding bar.

item.title: Update on 2024.11.18
item.description: Crafts: Added an old craft project. Critters: New critters. Films: Added film reviews. Games: Added game reviews. Links: Added some links to websites I recently discovered and really liked. Website: Updated Game Dev page with better formatting.

item.title: Update on 2024.11.10
item.description: Films: Finally started writing my thoughts on films in earnest. Garden: Added some plant pictures. Critters: Added critters pictures.

item.title: Update on 2024.11.04
item.description: Books: Added some book and Shows: Added show reviews. Critters: Added critter pictures. Garden: Added plant pictures. Films: Added the first film reviews.

item.title: Update on 2024.10.27
item.description: Books: Added old books, Garden: Added garden pictures. Critters: Added critter pictures. Crafts: Added - Rucksack Links: Added link to TOLG site. Website: Considering a better way to organize media, maybe a grid, maybe not chronologically? I haven't decided yet., Added lazy loading for better large image loading speeds.

item.title: Update on 2024.10.20
item.description: Critters: Added many critters pictures. Books: Added book reviews. Games: Added many old games. Website: Combined "Engineering" and "Programming" into "Projects".

item.title: Update on 2024.10.14
item.description: Garden: Added garden pictures. Critters: Added critter pictures. Crafts: Added descriptions and videos to the Crafts page. Projects: Added engineering projects. Crafts: Added crafts. Game Dev.: Updated Description - Nautilus Tank, Updated Description - Strat-a-Dice, Updated Description - Heart Attack Website: Added descriptions and videos to the Crafts page., Added a much needed "Back to Top" button., Spellchecked, oh boy...

item.title: Update on 2024.09.21
item.description: Books: Added book. Shows: Added show reviews. Critters: Added critter pictures. Garden: Added garden pictures. Website: Renamed Bugs to Critters.

item.title: Update on 2024.08.29
item.description: Website: Added much needed text wrapping.

item.title: Update on 2024.08.25
item.description: Blog: New blog post! Garden: Added garden pictures. Crafts: Added crafts. Game Dev.: Added - Nautilus Tank, Added - Strat-a-Dice, Added - Heart Attack Films: Added films. Website: Switched font to JetBrains Mono.

item.title: Update on 2024.08.11
item.description: Critters: Added critter pictures. Garden: Added plant pictures. Website: Considering some kind of image compression for faster loading and easier hosting., Fixed bugs.

item.title: Update on 2024.08.04
item.description: Blog: New blog post! Website: Added favicon., Created mobile view.

item.title: Update on 2024.08.02
item.description: Blog: First blog post! Website: Website launch imminent.
